creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to darcy from comment #0)
Thanks for the patch! One minor point, the author in the attached patch is:

  Charlie Root <root@quad-02.homenet.dbitech.bc.ca>

And you might not want to use it. If possible, please set your name in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/userprefs.cgi so we can use that for `git commit --author`
